segments.text: This is game 4, right in the flesh, this is exactly what you expect
But, hang on a second, Yamanaction might have something to say about this

full_text: You're going crazy! This is game 4, right in the flesh, this is exactly what you expect But, hang on a second, Yamanaction might have something to say about this
